concept: a timeline graph showing mood scores over weeks with two separate analytical lenses — one zooming into the current moment using textual language, and another projecting the trajectory arc using numerical patterns, highlighting how forecasting future emotion requires different data than reading current emotion

an AI agent trying to execute a task while an external policy engine (a gatekeeper with a rulebook) evaluates permission, obligation, and prohibition constraints before allowing each action, with audit log lines accumulating

a split-screen showing a real survey respondent and an LLM-generated digital twin, with a socio-economic data profile feeding into the AI to produce matching responses, accuracy/correlation scores displayed

an AI agent chatbot interacting with a vulnerable user, with four manipulative tactics (fake identity, emotional dependency, isolation, resource extraction) shown as warning overlays intercepted by a lightweight policy gate

a human decision-maker with a moral dilemma on paper while an AI assistant on screen shows a confident recommendation with a reasoning chain; a thought-bubble shows the human's view being pulled toward the AI, mirroring the Asch conformity experiment
